_note: Last updated: 2026-04-11. Source of truth for all planning. Update when anything changes.
name: Nacho

lifestyle.notes: Very limited time. Training must be efficient. Travel weeks require hotel gym fallback. Sun exposure is a priority and tracked as a health metric.

goals._note: Goals are organized by horizon. The long-term arc document (system/plans/longterm.md) is the authoritative planning document.

long_term_athletic.goal: Run 5k sub-15min in a race (to win it)

current_e5rm_targets.notes: Program targets are x5 (not x1), confirmed by user

golden_rules._note: These are non-negotiable principles. CLAUDE must check these before making any planning recommendation.
principles: Aesthetics and athleticism over pure strength numbers
Health as a metric (sleep, sun, HRV)
hard_constraints: Deload every 5 weeks or when load index flags HIGH
No training through sharp joint pain — modify or skip
Never sacrifice mobility or joint health for a lift PR
questions_to_resolve: What specific rules does 'longevity first' translate to in programming decisions?
What does 'health and sun' mean as a training constraint vs lifestyle priority?
Any dietary rules beyond insulin resistance / carb timing?

active_injuries.cause: Likely from arm training (curls, direct bicep work)
active_injuries.notes: Watch pull volume. Limit direct arm training. Stop any exercise if sharp pain. Monitor — if severity goes to 4-5, take a full deload from pulling.

health_context.notes: Carb timing matters. Higher carb around training. Avoid large carb meals before sleep.

current_program.name: 30-Week Strength
current_program.notes: Periodized 6-block program. Main lifts: Squat, Bench, Deadlift, OHP. Program targets are x5 sets, not 1RM tests.
